.file-embed.background: rgb(26, 26, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(14, 14, 14) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(14, 14, 14) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #333 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#333, color-mix(in srgb, #333 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #333 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#333, color-mix(in srgb, #333 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(14, 14, 14) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(14, 14, 14) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(14, 14, 14) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(88, 166, 255, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(14, 14, 14) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(34, 34, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(26, 26, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(26, 26, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(26, 26, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(26, 26, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
